title: Portable Agent Memory: A Protocol for Cryptographically-Verified Memory Transfer Across Heterogeneous AI Agents
verdict_impact: PARTIAL-OVERLAP — addresses cross-model memory portability via MCP but does NOT address CLI-specific storage schemas (Codex JSONL, Cursor SQLite, Cline JSON). Scope is GPT-4/Claude/Gemini model interop.

title: Collaborative Memory: Multi-User Memory Sharing in LLM Agents with Dynamic Access Control
verdict_impact: Multi-user sharing within a single agent system. No cross-CLI, no schema bridging.

title: Memory as a Service (MaaS): Rethinking Contextual Memory as Service-Oriented Modules for Collaborative Agents
verdict_impact: MCP-based memory module concept. Mentions OpenMemory and MemOS. No CLI-specific format bridging.

title: Multi-Agent Memory from a Computer Architecture Perspective: Visions and Challenges Ahead
verdict_impact: Conceptual framing of shared vs. distributed memory. Identifies cache sharing protocol as missing. No CLI specifics.

title: INMS: Memory Sharing for Large Language Model based Agents
verdict_impact: Shared conversational memory pool for abstract multi-agent systems. No coding CLIs, no schema bridging.

title: SAMEP: A Secure Agent Memory Exchange Protocol for Persistent Context Sharing in Multi-Agent AI Systems
verdict_impact: Security-focused memory exchange protocol with MCP/A2A interoperability. No CLI-specific schema bridging.

title: Enhancing Model Context Protocol (MCP) with Context-Aware Server Collaboration
verdict_impact: Shared Context Store (SCS) for MCP servers. General multi-agent, not coding CLI-specific.

title: LLM-Based Multi-Agent Blackboard System for Information Discovery in Data Science
verdict_impact: Blackboard architecture for homogeneous agent population in data science. No cross-CLI memory bridging.

title: A Survey of Agent Interoperability Protocols: MCP, ACP, A2A, and ANP
verdict_impact: Protocol survey. Useful background. No memory bridging between coding CLIs.

title: memorix: Open-source cross-agent memory layer for coding agents via MCP
verdict_impact: Implements the exact claim for Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Kiro, etc. Not peer-reviewed. Potential prior art in IP sense.

title: memory-bridge: Two-way memory sync between AI coding agents
verdict_impact: Implements cross-CLI bridging for Claude Code and Codex with format adapters. Not peer-reviewed.

title: agentmemory: Persistent memory for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI
verdict_impact: Persistent cross-CLI memory with hybrid search. Not peer-reviewed.

title: Keeping Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor memory in sync
verdict_impact: Practitioner post describing the exact problem and Unix-style solutions. No academic grounding.
